title: adonis aestivalis subsp. squarrosa
intro: Adonis aestivalis subsp. squarrosa, also known as Adonis or Spring Adonis, is a plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae, characterized by its bright yellow, five-petaled flowers and distinctive, hairy foliage. Traditionally, Adonis aestivalis subsp. squarrosa has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and psoriasis due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is also believed to offer various health benefits, including antioxidant and antiseptic properties, which may help protect against cell damage and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Adonis aestivalis subsp. squarrosa is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
